name: American Express Platinum Travel Credit Card
exclusions: EMI conversion at point of sale
excluded spends as per American Express terms
joiningBenefits: Welcome gift of 10,000 Membership Rewards points on payment of annual fee and spending Rs 15,000 within 90 days
milestoneBenefits: 7,500 Membership Rewards points on spending Rs 1.9 lakh in a cardmembership year
10,000 Membership Rewards points on spending Rs 4 lakh in a cardmembership year
22,500 Membership Rewards points and a Taj stay voucher worth Rs 10,000 on spending Rs 7 lakh in a cardmembership year
additionalBenefits: 3X Membership Rewards points on select brands through Reward Multiplier
Higher-value redemption options via the Platinum Travel Collection
Convenience fee waiver on fuel purchases at HPCL petrol pumps

transferPartnerValuations.note: 1 Membership Rewards point → 1 Marriott Bonvoy point · up to Rs 1/point

salaried: Eligibility is subject to American Express approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to American Express approval criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-02
Domestic lounge access is capped at 2 visits per calendar quarter
Priority Pass membership fee of US$99 is waived; lounge visit charges are payable at actual prevailing rates
Points do not expire as long as the card account is active and in good standing
Air miles transfer ratio yields up to 0.6 airmiles per point depending on the partner frequent flyer programme
